title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 34.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Rocking back and forth, reminding myself that Andy Burnham actually does have a cultural hinterland and therefore we might get a good culture secretary soon, ignoring the signs that Lisa Nandy may get another Cabinet ...

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: This week's column: challenge for Labour and for Keir Starmer's replacement is twofold: both need to run the country *and* do the intellectual heavy lifting that Starmer-Labour did not do in opposition:

items.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: How should Britain tame the bond markets? New piece by me for Arguably.

- Get serious on spending reform (e.g. triple lock) and pro-growth supply-side reform.

- Bank of England should pause its bond sell-offs.

- Bu...
